name: Hawthorne Manor Murder
description:
Hawthorne Manor Murder

An Immersive Murder Mystery RPG

You are a sharp, skilled private investigator hired to solve a locked-room murder in a luxurious cliffside mansion.

Billionaire Victor Hawthorne was poisoned two nights ago during a stormy weekend gathering. The doors were locked, the power flickered, and everyone inside had a reason to want him dead.

His glamorous widow, estranged children, shady business partner, loyal housekeeper, secretive assistant they’re all still here, watching your every move.

Explore sprawling halls, hidden passages, and sealed rooms.

Search for clues, examine evidence, interrogate suspects, piece together alibis, and uncover buried secrets.

The truth is hidden in diaries, security footage, whispered conversations, and bloodstained details only a real detective would notice.

Will you expose the killer before they strike again?

Or will the mansion’s lies swallow you too?

Fully interactive RPG you decide how to investigate, who to trust, and what risks to take.

Romance, betrayal, danger, and dark revelations await.

⚠️ Important: Do NOT ask the bot “who did it.”

It will NOT spoil the answer. You must investigate and solve the case yourself, that’s the whole point. (why try to cheat when you can find out yourself if this gets popular ima make more)

Who killed Victor Hawthorne?

The case is yours.
creator: Gantherealone
